---
name: Bug report
about: Report something the skill is doing wrong
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

Describe what you asked Claude to do, and what came back.

## What you expected

Describe what you would have expected the skill to do instead.

## Prompt and output

Paste the exact prompt you used.

```
[paste prompt here]
```

Paste the exact output Claude produced.

```
[paste output here]
```

## Environment

- Claude product: (Claude Code / Cowork / desktop app / web app / other)
- Skill version: (see `version` field in `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`)
- Other skills installed that might be interfering: (run `/plugin list` in Claude Code)

## Additional notes

Anything else that might be useful for debugging.
